items.text:
• <font color="#FF4500">get</font> + <font color="#FFD700">Sıfat</font> : My son <font color="#FF4500">got</font> <font color="#FFD700">big</font>: oğlum büyüdü.
• <font color="#FF4500">make</font> + <font color="#32CD32">someone</font> + <font color="#FFD700">Sıfat</font> : You <font color="#FF4500">made</font> <font color="#32CD32">me</font> <font color="#FFD700">angry</font> : beni sinirlendirdin.
• <font color="#FF4500">make</font> + <font color="#BA55D3">something</font> + <font color="#FFD700">Sıfat</font> : Inflation <font color="#FF4500">makes</font> the prices of everything <font color="#FFD700">more expensive</font>

items.tag: 2. Fiillerden → Fiil yapma : … birine … bişey yaptırtmak…. (Kime yaptırdığının önemi yoksa)
items.text:
• <font color="#FF4500">get</font> + <font color="#BA55D3">something</font> + <font color="#00FFFF">V3</font> : Ayşe <font color="#FF4500">got</font> <font color="#BA55D3">her hair</font> <font color="#00FFFF">done</font>
• <font color="#FF4500">have</font> + <font color="#BA55D3">something</font> + <font color="#00FFFF">V3</font> : I <font color="#FF4500">had</font> <font color="#BA55D3">my car</font> <font color="#00FFFF">fixed</font>

items.tag: 3. Fiillerden → Fiil yapma : … kişisine …  bişey yaptırtmak …(Kime yaptırdığını belirterek - AMA zorlama YOK!)
items.text:
• <font color="#FF4500">get</font> + <font color="#32CD32">someone</font> + (to) <font color="#00FFFF">V1</font> + <font color="#BA55D3">something</font> : Ayşe <font color="#FF4500">got</font> <font color="#32CD32">hairdresser</font> (to) <font color="#00FFFF">do</font> her hair
• <font color="#FF4500">have</font> + <font color="#32CD32">someone</font> + <font color="#00FFFF">V1</font> + <font color="#BA55D3">something</font> : I <font color="#FF4500">had</font> <font color="#32CD32">the dentist</font> <font color="#00FFFF">pull</font> my tooth

items.tag: 4. Fiillerden → Fiil yapma: :…. kişisine…. birşeyi ZORLA yaptırtmak… (ZORLA yaptırtmak)
items.text: • <font color="#FF4500">make</font> + <font color="#32CD32">someone</font> + <font color="#00FFFF">V1</font> + <font color="#BA55D3">something</font> : I <font color="#FF4500">made</font> <font color="#32CD32">my grandfather</font> <font color="#00FFFF">take</font> his medicine
